settings.chapter_1_headline: Every scent tells a story. This is ours.
settings.chapter_1_body: We believe fragrance is the most intimate form of self-expression. Each decant is a chapter — poured by hand, sealed with intention, and delivered as an invitation to discover something extraordinary.
settings.pullquote: Perfume is the art that makes memory speak.
settings.craft_body: Every decant is measured with precision, poured in small batches, and sealed in pharmaceutical-grade glass. We treat each vial like a handwritten letter — because it is one.

settings.name: Bergamot
settings.description: A bright, sun-drenched citrus that opens the composition with a burst of luminous energy.

settings.name: Turkish Rose
settings.description: Velvety and intoxicating, the rose anchors the fragrance with romantic depth and emotional warmth.

settings.name: Oud & Amber
settings.description: A smoky, resinous foundation that lingers on the skin for hours — the memory that stays.
